event.description:
**The Call for Code team is coming to New York City! Join us for the morning and learn how to help solve the world’s greatest challenges.**

‼️ [Please check Eventbrite for details and to RSVP](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/call-for-code-comes-to-you-new-york-city-tickets-390656743837). ‼️

## **About this event**

# Call for Code comes to You: New York City

Call for Code (*Tech for Good initiative at IBM*) invites teams of developers and problem solvers to leverage open innovation and develop technology solutions that address social and humanitarian issues in unique, clearly demonstrable ways, in support of ESG and CSR goals.
You are invited to an exclusive, personalized information and training session with the Call for Code team, hosted at IBM Astor Place from 9:30am-11:30am ET on Thursday, September 1st.

*\*Please arrive by 9:15am for check-in.*

During this session, learn how you and your team can become stand-out participants in our 2022 Call for Code Global Challenge (*Sustainability theme*) or participate in Call for Code in a number of other ways. You’ll hear from Call for Code business and technology leaders at IBM, representatives from our supporter and sponsor organizations, as well as past Call for Code winners!

**Agenda:**

* 9 – 9:30 AM: Guest check-in/Breakfast
* 9:30 – 9:35 AM: Executive welcome
* 9:35 – 9:45 AM: 2022 Call for Code and Challenge Overview/Program background and 2022 Global Challenge logistics
* 9:45 – 10 AM: Call for Code Platform Demo/Live demo of participant tools and resources, and instruction on building a team, getting help, and submitting projects
* 10 – 10:15 AM: Keynote Speaker
* 10:15 – 10:30 AM: Refreshments/Networking
* 10:30 – 11:15 AM: Technical demo: AI and Machine Learning services on IBM Cloud
* 11:15 – 11:30 AM: Call for Code success story/Wrap-up

Learn more about the 2022 Call for Code Global ([https://callforcode.org/](https://callforcode.org/))

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Call for Code Comes to You: New York City
